2606.27019.title: MinGram: A Minimalist Unigram Tokenizer with High Compression and Competitive Morphological Alignment
2606.27019.paper_summary: The Unigram tokenizer uses an elegant representation which makes it straightforward to edit vocabularies, but its training is comparatively heavy and complex. We introduce MinGram (Minimalist Unigram), which keeps the token-list representation but simplifies training using a BPE-derived seed vocabulary, Hard EM on a minimum-token path, and a single flat score-pruning step. This removes the suffix array, the forward-backward pass, and the iterative prune loop, leaving a procedure that requires little beyond tokenizer inference itself. By making token count the primary objective and using a Unigram score only as a tiebreak, MinGram keeps the compression of pure token-count methods while retaining much of the morphological alignment and downstream quality of probabilistic ones. Across six languages, MinGram compresses better than both BPE and standard Unigram, and a compression-oriented variant matches the strongest token-count compressors while retaining substantially higher morphological alignment. In controlled downstream language-model training, Unigram-family tokenizers, with MinGram among the best, consistently beat BPE in bits-per-byte.
2606.27019.paper_summary_zh: 單字法分詞器使用了一種優雅的表示方式，使得編輯詞彙變得簡單明瞭，但其訓練相對繁重且複雜。我們介紹了 MinGram（極簡單字法），它保留了標記列表表示，但通過使用 BPE 衍生的種子詞彙、在最小標記路徑上進行硬 EM，以及單一的平坦分數修剪步驟來簡化訓練。這樣去除了後綴數組、前向-後向傳遞和迭代修剪循環，留下了一個只需少量超出分詞器推斷本身的程序。通過將標記計數作為主要目標，並僅將單字法分數用作平局打破，MinGram 保持了純標記計數方法的壓縮，同時保留了許多形態對齊和下游質量的概率方法。在六種語言中，MinGram 的壓縮效果優於 BPE 和標準單字法，而一個以壓縮為導向的變體在保持顯著更高的形態對齊的同時，與最強的標記計數壓縮器相匹配。在受控的下游語言模型訓練中，單字法家族的分詞器，其中 MinGram 表現最佳，始終在每字節位數上超越 BPE。
2606.27019.author: Sander Land et.al.
